F82 Rule 34.28A inserted (18.6.2011) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2011 (S.I. 2011/1328) , rules 1 , 24


F83 Rule 34.28A(1)(a) substituted (20.12.2012) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 4) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/2806) , rules 1 , 21


F84 Rule 34.28A(1)(a)(i) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(6)(a)(i) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F85 Punctuation in rule 34.28A(1)(b) substituted (6.4.2012) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/679) , rules 1 , 28(a) (with rule 30 )


F86 Rule 34.28A(1)(c) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(6)(a)(ii) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)

metadata.title: Part 34 — Reciprocal Enforcement of Maintenance Orders
